terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Content: Bookorvia is a business management platform designed for service providers to manage bookings, clients, reviews, loyalty programs, and customer communications. By using Bookorvia, you agree to comply with these terms and use the service only for lawful purposes.
terms.section2Content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to provide accurate and complete information during registration and to update this information as needed.
terms.section3Content: Bookorvia offers subscription plans with various pricing tiers. You agree to pay all fees according to the plan you select. Billing occurs on a recurring basis unless you cancel your subscription. Refund policies are detailed separately.
terms.section4Content: You agree not to use Bookorvia for:
terms.section4Item1: Illegal activities or violations of any laws
terms.section4Item2: Harassment, abuse, or threats toward other users
terms.section4Item5: Any activity that disrupts or harms the service
terms.section5Content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Bookorvia is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of the service.
terms.section6Content: For questions about these terms, please contact us at our contact page.
terms.legalNote: Note: This is a general template placeholder. Before launching Bookorvia, please have a legal professional review and customize these terms for your jurisdiction and specific business requirements.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Item1: Account Information: Email address, password, and profile details (name, phone, address)
privacy.section1Item2: Business Profile: Business name, category, description, phone, WhatsApp number, and address
privacy.section1Item3: Client Data: Client names, phone numbers, booking history, and service preferences
privacy.section1Item4: Booking Information: Dates, times, services, and booking status
privacy.section1Item5: Reviews and Ratings: Customer ratings and review text
privacy.section1Item6: Loyalty Program Data: Stamp count, rewards, and customer preferences
privacy.section1Item7: Support Messages: Messages and attachments submitted through support tickets
privacy.section2Item1: Provide and improve the Bookorvia service
privacy.section2Item2: Manage your account and process subscriptions
privacy.section3Content: Your data is stored securely using industry-standard encryption. Bookorvia uses Supabase (PostgreSQL-based) for data storage. We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access.
privacy.section4Note: To exercise these rights, please contact us through our contact page.
privacy.section5Content: We do not sell your personal data to third parties. We only share data with service providers necessary to operate Bookorvia (hosting, payment processing, etc.), and they are bound by confidentiality agreements.
privacy.section6Content: For privacy-related questions, please contact us at our contact page.
privacy.legalNote: Note: This is a general privacy policy template. Before launch, please have a legal professional review and customize this policy according to applicable data protection regulations in your jurisdiction (GDPR, CCPA, etc.).

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.section1Content: Bookorvia is committed to fair and transparent billing practices. This policy outlines how subscription cancellations and refunds are handled.
refund.section2Content: You can cancel your subscription at any time through your account settings. Upon cancellation:
refund.section2Item1: Your access to premium features will end at the end of the current billing cycle
refund.section2Item2: No further charges will be applied
refund.section2Item3: Your business data will remain available for 30 days for export
refund.section3Content: Refunds are available under the following circumstances:
refund.section3Item1: Billing Errors: If you were charged in error, we will issue a refund
refund.section3Item2: Service Interruption: If the service was unavailable for an extended period due to our fault
refund.section3Item3: 14-Day Trial: If you cancel within 14 days of your first subscription payment, you may be eligible for a refund
refund.section4Content: The following are not eligible for refunds:
refund.section4Item1: Subscription fees after the 14-day trial period (except as noted above)
refund.section4Item2: Services already rendered or features already used
refund.section4Item3: Voluntary downgrades to lower tier plans during a billing cycle
refund.section5Item1: Contact our support team through the Support & Help section in your profile
refund.section5Item2: Provide details about your refund request, including order details and reason
refund.section5Item3: Our team will review your request within 3-5 business days
refund.section5Item4: If approved, the refund will be processed to your original payment method within 5-10 business days
refund.section6Content: If you believe you've been charged incorrectly:
refund.section6Item1: Contact support immediately with your invoice details
refund.section6Item2: We will investigate the charge within 3 business days
refund.section6Item3: Disputed charges will be credited back while under investigation
refund.section7Content: If you initiate a chargeback through your credit card or payment provider instead of contacting us first, your account may be suspended pending investigation. We encourage you to use our support channels for faster resolution.
refund.section8Content: For refund requests or billing questions, please contact us:
refund.section8Item2: Visit Contact Us for general inquiries
refund.section8Item3: Response times: within 24 hours for urgent matters, 3-5 business days for general requests
refund.legalNote: Note: This is a general template refund policy. Specific terms may be updated based on actual subscription plans offered. Please review our Terms of Service for complete details.

public.messageSent: Your message has been sent successfully
public.bookingSystemDescription: Turn first-time clients into loyal regulars with smart booking, reviews, and loyalty tools
public.manageBookingsCalendarReviewsLoyalty: Manage bookings, calendar availability, reviews, loyalty, follow-ups, and your public business page from one simple platform.
public.fourteenDaysFreeNoCard: 14 days free - no credit card needed
public.weAreHereToHelp: We're here to help. Reach out with any questions or concerns.
public.findAnswersToCommonQuestions: Find answers to common questions about Bookorvia and how to use it effectively.
public.mostBusinessesLoseClients: Most businesses lose clients after the first visit
public.lackToolsStayConnected: They lack the tools to stay connected and bring customers back
public.supabaseEnvironmentDescription: This page verifies that your public Supabase environment variables are available to the app.
public.publicSupabaseVariablesAvailable: Success — public Supabase variables are available.
public.publicSupabaseVariablesMissing: One or more public Supabase variables are missing. Check your .env.local.
public.changeLanguageTitle: Change language / Cambiar idioma / Changer la langue
public.problemMissedBookingsExplain: A client visits once, loves the service, but you have no way to remind them to book again. They move on to a competitor.
public.problemForgottenFollowUpsExplain: Businesses rely on memory to reach out to customers. Important follow-ups slip through the cracks, and regular clients never hear from you again.
public.problemNoReviewSystemExplain: Happy clients don't know where to leave reviews. Meanwhile, even one upset client can post a negative review unchallenged. Your reputation stays hidden.
public.problemMessyBookingExplain: Bookings come from calls, WhatsApp, Instagram, and walk-ins with zero central calendar. Double-bookings happen. Clients get conflicting information.
public.problemNoLoyaltyExplain: Regular clients are your best asset, but many businesses track loyalty manually or not at all. Repeat customers feel undervalued and invisible.
public.problemNoHistoryExplain: Without a client database, you forget names, preferences, what they bought, and their service history. Every visit feels like the first time.
public.beforePoint1: Bookings scattered across calls, WhatsApp, Instagram
public.beforePoint2: Follow-ups depend on memory and manual reminders
public.beforePoint3: Happy clients never asked for reviews
public.beforePoint4: No loyalty tracking, clients feel forgotten
public.afterPoint1: One unified calendar. Bookings in one place.
public.afterPoint2: Automated follow-ups sent at the right time
public.afterPoint4: Digital loyalty cards visible to customers
public.afterPoint5: Complete client history at your fingertips
